Good afternoon, Almax
I want to thank you for the outstanding service you provide. I’m truly delighted with my subscription and have learned so much from you. Congratulations on your great work! I hope you keep it up for a long time.
I have a question, if I may: how can I view the daily spread you mention (e.g., whether it’s an iron condor, a butterfly, etc.)? Where can I find it so I can learn to interpret it on my own?
Thank you very much in advance for your help.
